author: gcolvin
content: OK.  It's an Informational document.  It lays out history and concepts.  A Motivation section I can do.  There is no Specification: it's information.  And Rationale?  What does that mean?  Why I chose to inform the community about what I did instead of everything else in the world I might have?  I feel like I'm being forced to a hammer one round peg into three square holes.  I'll it do if I have no choie, but it will not improve the qualityof the document.  It will just waste my time .
